was the 50th season of the [International Hockey League](/wiki/International_Hockey_League_(1945%E2%80%932001) "International Hockey League (1945–2001)"), a North American minor professional league. 17 teams participated in the regular season, and the Denver Grizzlies won the Turner Cup.

The **1994–95 IHL season** was the 50th season of the [International Hockey League](/wiki/International_Hockey_League_(1945%E2%80%932001) "International Hockey League (1945–2001)"), a North American minor professional league. 17 teams participated in the regular season, and the Denver Grizzlies won the Turner Cup.

| [Ken McKenzie Trophy](/wiki/Ken_McKenzie_Trophy_(IHL) "Ken McKenzie Trophy (IHL)"): (Best U.S.-born first-year player) | [Chris Marinucci](/wiki/Chris_Marinucci "Chris Marinucci"), [Denver Grizzlies](/wiki/Utah_Grizzlies_(1995%E2%80%932005) "Utah Grizzlies (1995–2005)") |
| [Leo P. Lamoureux Memorial Trophy](/wiki/Leo_P._Lamoureux_Memorial_Trophy "Leo P. Lamoureux Memorial Trophy"): (Player with most points) | [Stephane Morin](/wiki/St%C3%A9phane_Morin "Stéphane Morin"), [Minnesota Moose](/wiki/Minnesota_Moose "Minnesota Moose") |
| [Norman R. "Bud" Poile Trophy](/wiki/Norman_R._%22Bud%22_Poile_Trophy_(IHL) "Norman R. \"Bud\" Poile Trophy (IHL)"): (Most valuable player, playoffs) | [Kip Miller](/wiki/Kip_Miller "Kip Miller"), [Denver Grizzlies](/wiki/Utah_Grizzlies_(1995%E2%80%932005) "Utah Grizzlies (1995–2005)") |
